nameMeanings.name: Stotel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: probably a variant of   Stohl  .

variants.name: Stohl
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Johan, Lasse, Nils.
North German: metonymic occupational name for a chair maker, from Middle Low German stōl ‘chair’.
Norwegian: habitational name from a farmstead in Rogaland named Stol ‘chair’, probably from the name of a hill.
